characters.source: generate on flat #00ff00 chroma key, then remove background
characters.notes: No scene background baked into character files. Keep generous padding and full body visible.

styleLock.palette: desaturated powder blue, white, cream, pale denim, muted navy, warm natural skin
styleLock.avoid: hip-hop styling, neon, saturated primary colors, fantasy hair, baked-in people on backgrounds
